channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Most UK High-Risk Investors Have Several Years of Experience, Study Shows
item.description: A recent study by TradingPlatforms.co.uk analyzing the FCA Financial Lives 2024 survey has shown that most UK adults investing in high-risk products like cryptocurrencies and CFDs are not beginners. T...

item.title: European and U.S. Involvement in Ukrainian Attacks on Russia
item.description: The article outlines the increasing intensity of Ukrainian attacks on Russian territory and infrastructure, highlighting the alleged involvement of European countries and the United States. Between Ma...

item.title: How mobile casino design and payment ease dey boost gaming adoption in Africa
item.description: For Africa now, plenty casino users don move from laptop go phone because mobile gaming don turn normal thing, no be backup plan again. According to report from GSMA, the mobile sector add about $220 ...

item.title: Quebec Court Approves Class Action on Uber’s Cancellation Fees
item.description: The Quebec Superior Court has given the green light for a class-action lawsuit against Uber, focusing on the company's cancellation fee policies. The lawsuit was initiated by Valerie Ohayon, who claim...

item.title: US Secretary Rubio Claims Air Campaign on Iran Can Achieve Goals Without Ground Troops
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio has said that the ongoing conflict in the Gulf against Iran is expected to last weeks rather than months. He insisted that the United States can achieve its objective...

item.title: Brisbane Broncos host Dolphins in Round 4 NRL clash at CommBank Stadium
item.description: In Round 4 of the 2026 NRL Premiership, the Brisbane Broncos faced off against the Dolphins at CommBank Stadium in Sydney. The match featured several exciting moments, including crucial saves and clos...

item.title: Nigeria’s Super Eagles Beat Iran 2-1 in Antalya Friendly Match
item.description: Nigeria’s Super Eagles don show say dem never lose touch as dem beat Iran 2-1 for friendly international match wey happen for Antalya, Turkiye on Friday. Dem score first quick, just six minutes after ...

item.title: Iranian Football Team Shows Support for Girls Killed in Minab School Strike
item.description: In a powerful gesture of empathy, Iran’s men’s national football team demonstrated solidarity with victims of the recent Minab school strike. Ahead of a friendly match against Nigeria in Turkey, the p...

item.title: NLEX Road Warriors Coach Praises Robert Bolick's Clutch Shot
item.description: NLEX Road Warriors coach Jong Uichico had high praise for Robert Bolick after the guard hit a clutch three-pointer that secured a vital victory for the team. Uichico remarked that the shot was somethi...

item.title: PCB seeks explanation from Naseem Shah over alleged breach of contract and media guidelines
item.description: The Pakistan Cricket Board (PCB) has officially issued a show-cause notice to fast bowler Naseem Shah, accusing him of violating the terms of his central contract and the board’s media policy. Accordi...

item.title: Pakistan Government Expands Roshan Digital Account Scheme to Foreign Investors and Institutions
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif has stated that expanding the Roshan Digital Account (RDA) scheme to include foreign nationals, companies, and institutional investors will further strengthen Pakistan as...

item.title: FBI Director Kash Patel’s Personal Email Compromised by Hackers Allegedly Linked to Iran
item.description: Iran-linked hackers have reportedly accessed and published content from the personal email of FBI Director Kash Patel. The group responsible, Handala Hack Team, identifies as a pro-Palestinian vigilan...

item.title: Kimani Ichung’wah Faces Hostile Crowd in Kiambu During President Ruto’s Visit
item.description: During President William Ruto’s working tour in Kiambu County on Friday, March 27, Juja residents gave Kikuyu MP Kimani Ichung’wah a very rough reception. Ichung’wah, who was accompanying the presiden...

item.title: Dan Osborne struggles emotionally following confirmation of separation from Jacqueline Jossa
item.description: Dan Osborne, the 34-year-old former TOWIE star, was photographed in tears in his car after news broke of his separation from actress Jacqueline Jossa, 33. The couple, married for nearly nine years, ha...

item.title: Karnataka Chief Secretary holds review meeting on security and crowd control for IPL opener at M. Chinnaswamy Stadium
item.description: Karnataka’s Chief Secretary, Shalini Rajneesh, convened a high-level meeting in Bengaluru to review the comprehensive security and logistical measures in place for the upcoming Indian Premier League (...

item.title: PM Shehbaz highlights Pakistan’s diplomatic efforts amid Middle East war and oil price crisis
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif addressed the nation on Friday evening, focusing on the rapidly escalating conflict in the Middle East and its impact on Pakistan’s economy. He began by assuring citizens...

item.title: PM Shehbaz declines proposed fuel price hike amid global oil crisis
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif announced on Friday that he had once again rejected a proposal to raise the prices of petrol and high-speed diesel (HSD), despite significant pressure caused by the ongoi...

item.title: Police Report Alleges Illegal Spending and Political Interference in NITR ₦391 Million Fraud Case
item.description: SaharaReporters don uncover one big corruption matter for the Nigerian Institute for Trypanosomiasis Research (NITR). According to leaked papers and police report, the Overseeing Director-General, Dr....

item.title: One Nation projected to gain second seat as SA election reshapes state politics
item.description: According to ABC projections, Pauline Hanson’s One Nation is set to secure a second lower house seat in South Australia, marking the party’s first success of this kind outside Queensland. The party’s ...

item.title: Airport Police Set To Honour Fallen Officers And Strengthen Community Ties For 2026 National Police Day
item.description: The Airport Police Command don roll out their schedule for the 2026 National Police Day celebration wey go hold from March 30 to April 7, 2026. The theme for this year na 'Community Partnership: Build...
